# piano-roll

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sonata Display: Synthesia-like pitch × time piano roll. Draws notes via its published Projection (time-axis + pitch-plane capabilities), auto-scrolls the time axis to keep the playback cursor in view, and hosts capability-compatible overlays.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Sonata.Display` "Piano Roll" → `PianoRoll`
